title: A small team ships a faster research workflow
summary: The update reduces manual review time and adds clearer checkpoints before publishing a daily briefing.

title: New open dataset improves benchmark repeatability
summary: The release includes source metadata, reproducible collection notes, and a changelog for downstream users.

title: Creator tooling adds one-click audio mixing
summary: The feature loops user-provided background music under generated narration and exports a mobile vertical video.
